meta.title: Press Releases | Prayaan Capital
meta.description: Official press releases and company announcements from Prayaan Capital.

articles.title: Prayaan Capital Launches Operations in Telangana
articles.excerpt: Prayaan Capital today announced the opening of its first three branches in Hyderabad, Warangal, and Karimnagar.

articles.title: Prayaan Capital Raises ₹100 Cr in Series B Round
articles.excerpt: The capital will be deployed towards expanding the loan book in Andhra Pradesh and Telangana.

articles.title: Prayaan Capital Launches AI Underwriting Platform
articles.excerpt: The platform reduces credit decision time from 5 days to 48 hours through automated data analysis.
